Package com.nib.supernaut.files

Class DatabaseFileSubSystem

java.lang.Object
com.nib.supernaut.files.DatabaseFileSubSystem
All Implemented Interfaces:
IFileSubSystem, Closeable, AutoCloseable
public class DatabaseFileSubSystem extends Object implements IFileSubSystem, Closeable
